Form_EditionIdentifier_A.tooltip: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

Form_CompletionDate_A.tooltip: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Producer_FullName_A.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the producer / agency.

Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A.tooltip: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols.  If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

Policy_EffectiveDate_A.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Insurer_FullName_A.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

Insurer_NAICCode_A.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC).

NamedInsured_FullName_A.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page.

GeneralLiability_CoverageIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the claims made or occurrence option applies for the general liability policy.

GeneralLiability_ClaimsMadeIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "claims made" option applies on the general liability policy.

GeneralLiability_OccurrenceIndicator_A.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, occurrence basis applies.

GeneralLiability_OwnersAndContractorsPro.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the owners and contractors protective option applies for the general liability policy.

GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageIndicator_.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates other coverage not found on the form exists for the general liability policy.

GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageDescriptio.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the general liability policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_PropertyDamage_Deductib.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a property damage deductible is requested.
Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the Property Damage coverage.

GeneralLiability_BodilyInjury_Deductible.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a bodily injury deductible is requested.
Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the Bodily Injury coverage.

GeneralLiability_OtherDeductibleIndicato.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a deductible is requested on the coverage other than Property Damage or Bodily Injury.

GeneralLiability_OtherDeductibleDescript.tooltip: Enter text: The type of deductible being requested other than property damage and bodily injury.

GeneralLiability_OtherDeductibleAmount_A.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the Other Coverage.

GeneralLiability_DeductiblePerClaimIndic.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a per claim deductible applies to individual claims even if the claims are all related to the same occurrence or event.

GeneralLiability_DeductiblePerOccurrence.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a per occurrence deductible applies once to each occurrence no matter how many individual claims result from the occurrence or event.

GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitA.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, general aggregate limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies per policy.
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies per project.
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies per location.
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies to option is other than those listed on the form.
Enter text: The description of the other option to which the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies.

GeneralLiability_ProductsAndCompletedOpe.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, products and completed operations aggregate limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_PersonalAndAdvertisingI.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, personal and advertising injury limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_EachOccurrence_LimitAmo.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, each occurrence limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_FireDamageRentedPremise.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, damage to rented premises each occurrence limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_MedicalExpense_EachPers.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, medical expense each person limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_EmployeeBenefits_LimitA.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability employee benefits limit amount.

GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageLimitDescr.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the general liability policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageLimitAmoun.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, other coverage limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

GeneralLiability_Products_PremiumAmount_.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium for products coverage.

GeneralLiability_OtherCoveragePremiumAmo.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium for other general liability coverage.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_TotalPrem.tooltip: Enter amount: The total premium amount for the commercial general liability line of business.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_RemarkTex.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated with the general liability line of business.  Use this section to provide any additional information required for underwriting or rating.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

GeneralLiability_UninsuredUnderinsuredMo.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if uninsured/underinsured motorist coverage is to be provided under the policy.

AthleticTeam_AgeGroup_OverEighteenIndica.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are over 18 years old.

AthleticTeam_SponsorshipExtentDescriptio.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the extent of sponsorship the named insured provides for the athletic team.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any structural alterations contemplated?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Structura.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any structural alterations contemplated.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any demolition exposure contemplated?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Demolitio.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any demolition exposure contemplated.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Has applicant been active in or is currently active in joint ventures?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Applicant.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any joint ventures in which the applicant may be currently active.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Do you lease employees to or from other employers?".

AdditionalInterest_FullName_B.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company to whom employees are leased.

AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCa.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

AdditionalInterest_FullName_C.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company to whom employees are leased.

AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCa.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

AdditionalInterest_FullName_D.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company from whom employees are leased.

AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCa.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

AdditionalInterest_FullName_E.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company from whom employees are leased.

AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCa.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Is there a labor interchange with any other business or subsidiaries?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_LabourInt.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any labor interchange with any other business or subsidiaries.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are day care facilities operated or controlled?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_DayCareFa.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any daycare facilities operated or controlled.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Have any crimes occurred or been attempted on your premises within the last specified number of years?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_CrimesOcc.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any crimes that  occurred or been attempted on your premises within the last three (3) years

Contractors_Question_AAGCode_A.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Is there a formal, written safety and security policy in effect?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_FormalSaf.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any formal, written safety and security policy in effect.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Does the business' promotional literature make any representation about the safety or security of the premises?".

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_BusinessP.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any business promotional literature that makes any representations about the safety or security of the premises.

GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_RemarkTex.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated with the general liability line of business.  Use this section to provide any additional information required for underwriting or rating.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_Signat.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states.

Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_FullNa.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form.

Producer_StateLicenseIdentifier_A.tooltip: Enter identifier: The State License Number of the producer.

NamedInsured_Signature_A.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the applicant or named insured.

NamedInsured_SignatureDate_A.tooltip: Enter date: The date the form was signed by the applicant or named insured.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Producer_NationalIdentifier_A.tooltip: Enter identifier: The National Producer Number (NPN) as defined in the National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR).  Note: The NPN is not the same as the producer state license number.
